name: Euclid's Elements Book I — Propositions 31–41
description: Dependency graph for Propositions 31–41 of Euclid's Elements Book I. Parallelograms, triangles, areas. Shows how propositions depend on postulates (P1–P5), common notions (CN1–CN5), and prior propositions.
